title: Biona Fizzy Peaches Organic , 75g
description: Product Description Biona Organic Fizzy Peache are a new addition to the Biona sweets range. Made with real fruit juices, these tangy sweets are full to the brim with real peachy flavour. They are gluten and gelatine free, perfect for the whole family to enjoy. Ingredients Glucose Syrup*, Sugar*, Gelling Agent (Pectin), Acid (Maleic Acid, Citric Acid), Acidity Regulator (Sodium Citrates), Natural Turmeric Flavouring*, Natural Flavouring, Colouring Plant Juice Concentrate* (Black Carrot*) *=Certified Organic Ingredients Directions Ready to Eat Manufacturer Contact Information 6a Lower Teddington Road, KT1 4ER See more
